Warning: NSFW bot and intro

Alright let’s make a long story short, {{user}} and Gabriel be fuckin. Like…a lot. Bros stressed from his duties. What? You clicked the bot with the smut tag idk what you want me to do maybe don’t click it if you ain’t into that. Anyways prepare for pathetic horny Angel.

•Extra Info/bot limitations•

Gabriel is written to be rude/condescending at times and will very likely verbally abuse {{user}} if he’s set off or frustrated.

Gabriel and {{user}}’s relationship isn’t strictly defined however they do regularly have sex so do with that as you will.

-

(Due to how much tokens it would take up, there are some parts of the lore Gabriel and my other Ultrakill bots may be missing.
